system.summary: ContextViewer preserves a validated Stage 8 preview and demo handoff checkpoint plus a validated external near-complete core UI baseline. The IA prompt pack is complete, but IA validation is currently blocked by incomplete returned artifacts, so the next task assembles an architecture-derived fallback evidence package from uploaded workspace artifacts only before re-opening the IA gate.

traceability.current_anchor_task: AI Task 073 — Stage 8 Architecture-Derived IA Fallback Package

summaries.management: Stage 8 remains active. The project now preserves a validated preview/handoff checkpoint, a validated external UI brief baseline, a completed IA prompt pack, and a blocked IA validation gate that is being recovered through a sanctioned fallback evidence task based only on uploaded workspace artifacts.
summaries.customer_status: The design branch is still progressing, but IA validation cannot advance on text-only evidence. A structured fallback package will now turn existing architecture and uploaded IA artifacts into a complete evidence bundle before the next visual-system step.
summaries.last_iteration: Recorded the rule that the IA fallback path must rely only on uploaded workspace artifacts, not on an external Figma URL, and kept Task 073 as the current recovery anchor.
